title: Op Dirt
description: Holding a dirt block grants you creative mode
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c978c16a9c2744ac341d96dbbe1ae9d688913ab_0.webp)
**Description:**

The Op Dirt Datapack for Minecraft to enhance your gameplay by allowing you to switch to Creative mode simply by holding a dirt block in your hand. This datapack automatically loads even in Hardcore mode, ensuring you have access to Creative mode when needed.

**Features:**

- **Creative Mode Activation:** Hold a dirt block in your main hand to instantly switch to Creative mode.
- **Seamless Transition:** Release the dirt block or switch to another item to revert back to Survival mode.
- **Automatic Loading:** The datapack is automatically loaded in your world, including Hardcore mode, for uninterrupted gameplay.
- **Easy Installation:** Simple and quick setup process to get you started.

**Installation Steps:**

1. **Place the Datapack:**

   Place the `Op_Dirt` folder in the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world.

2. **Load the Datapack:**

   Start Minecraft and load your world. Use the `/reload` command if necessary to ensure the datapack is loaded.

3. **Activate Creative Mode:**

   Hold a dirt block in your main hand to switch to Creative mode. Release the dirt block or switch to another item to revert back to Survival mode.

The Op Dirt Datapack provides a convenient and efficient way to switch to Creative mode in Minecraft , even in Hardcore mode, by simply holding a dirt block. Enjoy enhanced building and exploration capabilities with this easy-to-use datapack!
